title: Slim Armor
description: Slim shoulder pieces to fit your slim player's arms perfectly!
body:
Did you also notice the huge space between your player's arms and the armor's shoulder piece? Does it annoy you? Well, you've found the right pack :D

# Features
- This resourcepack modifies the shoulder pieces of the armor to fit perfectly with your slim player's arms!
- Works in multiplayer too!!
- The armor is also slimmer for the armor stand, but not for other mobs.

# !!!IMPORTANT!!!
This pack requires EMF (Entity Model Features)\
It will not work if you don't have EMF installed or if you have a Steve sized skin.
